category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Bash Language Server as bringing an IDE-like experience for bash scripts.
source_facts.description says bash-language-server is a Language Server for Bash.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Bash Language Server.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, features, editor setup, and configuration references.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it is based on Tree Sitter and supports shellcheck and shfmt; topics include bash and language-server.
source_facts.description and executables identify a Bash language server CLI.
